title: pronephrium borneense
intro: Pronephrium borneense is a species of fern in the family Marattiaceae, native to Borneo and characterized by its unique, large fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pronephrium borneense include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate pain, making it a popular herbal remedy among local communities. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are typically dried, powdered, and mixed with water or other ingredients to create teas, infusions, or topical creams for medicinal use.
